message:
perf(tests): consolidate cmd/bd test suites to shared DB pattern (bd-1rh)

Refactored stale_test.go, ready_test.go, and dep_test.go to use shared
DB setup instead of per-test store initialization. Eliminates 12 Dolt
store creations serialized behind doltNewMutex.

- stale_test.go: 5 stores → 1 (TestStaleSuite with all stale subtests)
- ready_test.go: 4 stores → 1 (merged BuildParentEpicMap, DeferUntil,
  Unassigned tests into TestReadySuite)
- dep_test.go: 6 stores → 1 (merged BlocksFlag and FK error tests into
  TestDependencySuite)

Result: cmd/bd test time 162s → 57s (-65%)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
